---
title: "git_monitor.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/intel/git_monitor.ts"
loc: 58
complexity: 5
logic_score: 4.68
style_score: 4.01
intel_score: 6.14
overall_score: 5.03
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [execa](file://execa)
- [registry](file://../pathRegistry.ts)
- [*](file://node:path)

### Exports
- `GitChronograph`
- `GitChronograph`
- `root`
- `relPath`
- `commitStdout`
- `diffStdout`
- `timeStdout`
- `lines7d`
- `stats`
- `match`
- `root`
- `execa`
- `counts`
